title: Domino's will 'tip' customers $3 if they order for pickup as the chain tries to convince customers to skip delivery
text: Domino's is trying to increase its pickup business by sweetening the deal for customers willing to make the trip themselves.

title: Domino's will pay you $3 to not get your pizza delivered, in an effort to help harried employees
text: Facing a shortage of workers, Domino's Pizza is hoping to incentivize its customers to choose carryout over delivery.

title: These 2 Under-the-Radar Stocks Have Incredibly Bright Futures
text: These two companies might not get a lot of press, but they will likely continue doing well by offering products their core customers want.

title: 7 Top Stock Picks for Long-term Investors Looking for This Decade's Winners
text: Despite recent volatility, these seven top stock picks are among the long-term holdings that could come out ahead as this decade's winners. The post 7 Top Stock Picks for Long-term Investors Looking for This Decade's Winners appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: 3 Resilient Stocks to Help Solidify Your Portfolio
text: It helps to load up your investment portfolio with resilient stocks that can successfully weather crises.

title: Kohl's, Gap, And Domino's Rally On A Roller Coaster Monday
text: Stocks bounce back from a bloodbath to close in positive territory. The Russell 2000 led the rebound as bargain hunters picked up riskier assets.

title: Domino's® Announces Q4/Year-End 2021 Earnings Webcast
text: ANN ARBOR, Mich., Jan. 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Domino's Pizza Inc. (NYSE: DPZ) announces the following event: What: Domino's Fourth Quarter/Year-End 2021 Earnings Webcast When: Tuesday, March 1 at 10 a.m.

title: 3 Stocks Earning a Strong Return on Invested Capital
text: One way to identify high-quality companies is to consider their return on invested capital. The companies that can turn invested dollars into profits will likely see an increase in earnings per share, which can send share prices higher.

title: 4 Stock Picks for a Long-Term Approach
text: The GuruFocus business predictability rating ranks companies on a five-star scale, defining the more predictable companies as businesses whose revenue per share and Ebitda per share (or book value per share in case of financial stocks) have been growing steadily and who have produced a strong long-term performance of their stock prices.

title: Domino's Showcases Quantitative Investing Pitfalls, Stock Continues To Defy Gravity
text: Domino's Pizza offers investors ample capital appreciation upside potential. The high end of our fair value estimate range, derived through our discounted free cash flow analysis process, is $665 per share of Domino's. Shares are trading at ~$480 each.

title: Domino's CEO Says Food Costs Are Soaring
text: The global pizza giant is maintaining sales growth as economies reopen.

title: Domino's Pizza forecasts soaring food costs in 2022, reiterates long-term sales outlook
text: Domino's Pizza expects soaring food prices in 2022 but reiterated its long-term sales outlook.

title: Domino's Pizza: The Cash Flow King Of The Restaurant Industry
text: Domino's Pizza has a Cash Flow Return on Invested Capital of 60%, nearly double any other competitor. On a trading multiple basis, Domino's OCF and FCF multiples are in line with low-growth players despite its 25% 3-year revenue CAGR.

title: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Posts Banner Year in 2021
text: 2021 proved to be another bang-up year for Bill Ackman (Trades, Portfolio)'s Pershing Square Capital despite its ongoing issues with its special purpose acquisition company, the pandemic and a number of economic headwinds.
